lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Nilsal. Interested in buying some weapons or armour?

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Of course, and you won't find anything finer than what I offer. I didn't become the official blacksmith to the Royal Family of Varlamore by producing subpar goods.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're the official blacksmith? Does that mean you can sell me some armour like the knights around here wear?

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Are you a Knight of Varlamore?

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: Than I cannot. However, I still have plenty of other items that might interest you. Would you like to take a look?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you repair something for me?

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: You don't have anything I can repair.

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: I'll need [x] coins to repair that.

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: There you go, happy doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Blacksmith
lines.text: As you wish. You are always welcome to return if you change your mind.
